# frame

**Instance Property**

The frame of the display.

## Declaration

```swift
var frame: CGRect { get }
```

## Accessing dimensions

- **width**: The width of the display in points.
- **height**: The height of the display in points.

items.description: The width of the display in points.
items.name: width

items.description: The height of the display in points.
